description: Primitive vocabulary for manipulation bootstrapping in MuJoCo. Policies choose base targets (absolute, relative, or object-centric), hand poses or continuous closure, dwell times, sensor-conditioned step termination, and success checks.

base.z: slide_z qpos, metres; positive lowers the palm in the current palm-down scene

state.hand_pose: last named keyframe pose or closure command

contacts.hand_object_bodies: hand bodies currently touching the object

step_fields.until: optional list of {metric, op, value} checks; the step ends as soon as they all hold, with duration_s as the timeout. Use to make steps reactive, e.g. close until contacts.hand_object_count >= 2.
step_fields.assert: optional list of {metric, op, value} checks evaluated after the step; failure aborts the schedule.

set_base.description: Command the floating base position actuators to absolute targets.

move_delta.description: Shift the current base targets by a relative offset. Result is clipped to base ranges.

approach_object.description: Set base x/y targets relative to the object's position at command time (object-centric), and base z to an absolute target. In the palm-down scene an x offset near -0.035 centres the grasp site over the object.

hand_pose.description: Command all hand actuators toward a named keyframe pose (macro).

grasp.description: Continuous closure: interpolate all hand actuators between open hand (0.0) and grasp hard (1.0).

wait.description: Step the physics without changing current targets.

setup_fields.object_pos: [x, y, z] initial object position; z should be the object's half height
setup_fields.object: optional {shape: box|sphere|cylinder, size: [..], mass?, friction?} variation
setup_fields.perturb: optional {time_s, velocity: [vx, vy, vz]} mid-episode velocity kick to the object
setup_fields.embodiment: optional 'gripper' to run on the parallel-jaw gripper scene instead of the Shadow Hand
